content: Task: Fix TUI not showing live prices. Engine works in headless mode but TUI Live Prices panel is empty. Teams: Trading (Rust Engine Dev).

Identified 4 bugs: (1) TUI activation ignores --paper-both, (2) PriceCache.register_pair() doesnt seed entries so get() returns None, (3) TUI filter_map silently drops pairs with no cache data, (4) stale KMOCK-* mock pairs in DB dont match real Kalshi tickers.

Fixed all 4 bugs. Fix 1: TUI activation checks paper_both. Fix 2: register_pair seeds zero PricePair. Fix 3: TUI uses unwrap_or_else instead of ? so pairs always show. Fix 4: KMOCK-* pairs filtered before DB check so fresh discovery triggers. cargo check/clippy/test all pass (190/190).
TUI price fix complete. 4 bugs fixed across 3 files.
